query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  name, 
  slug,
  atoll,
  description,
  bestTimeToVisit,
  currency,
  language,
  coordinates,
  topThingsToDo,
  LENGTH(description) as desc_length,
  LENGTH(topThingsToDo) as activities_length
FROM island_guides 
ORDER BY name
